name: TestIso11783IL_OPStoreVersion
title: TestIso11783IL_OPStoreVersion
tables: long TestIso11783IL_OPStoreVersion( dbNode node, char versionName[] );

The function stores the current object pool on the Virtual Terminal. A Store Version command is sent to the Virtual Terminal. Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.
node Simulation node to apply the function.

versionName name which is used to store the object pool For VT version smaller than 5 the name must be 7 characters long. For VT version 5 and higher a name with more than 7 characters is sent with the Store Extended Version command.
0: function has been executed successfully <0: an error has occurred, see error codes
